title: Programming with Cursor via MCP
description: Configures AgentCore for software engineering teams that connect Cursor IDE through MCP to use memory, docs drift/write, code graph, tasks, and durable project writes.

tools.name: agentcore_ping
tools.description: Confirm MCP connectivity and return active usage profile metadata for this project.

tools.name: agentcore_get_effective_profile
tools.description: Return the effective Usage Profile (domain pack, feature profile, connectors, MCP tools) for the scoped project.

tools.name: agentcore_memory_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve current-state memory hints for a programming task (maps to memory retrieval capability).

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_search
tools.description: Semantic search over the code-knowledge graph (Neo4j when configured) for symbols relevant to a programming query.

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_get_symbol
tools.description: Fetch one code-graph symbol by symbol_id or qualified_name (includes AI documentation fields).

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_neighbors
tools.description: Return structural neighbors (CALLS/IMPORTS/…) for a symbol; uses Neo4j expand when available.

rel_type.description: Optional edge type filter, e.g. CALLS

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_impact
tools.description: Multi-hop impact neighborhood around a symbol (structural expand + importance hints when Neo4j GDS/APOC available).

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_explore
tools.description: PRIMARY code-graph tool: answer how/X works or flows with one call — seeds + call path + budgeted source (sibling skeletonization). Prefer this over wide Read/Grep.

query.description: Natural-language or symbol terms (e.g. login auth flow)

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_detect_changes
tools.description: Risk-scored review context for changed files: affected flows, test gaps, review priorities.

changed_files.description: Repo-relative or absolute paths that changed

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_architecture_overview
tools.description: Communities, hubs, bridges, knowledge gaps, surprising connections, and suggested architecture questions.

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_path
tools.description: Shortest path between two symbols (ids or qualified names) on the code graph.

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_hybrid_search
tools.description: Hybrid lexical + semantic search merged with Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF).

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_freshness
tools.description: Report or mark pending file sync (stale banners for explore/review).

file_path.description: If set, mark this path pending until next ingest

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_generation_context
tools.description: Build a generation context pack (seed symbol + related symbols/docs) for coding agents.

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_ingest_file
tools.description: Index one source file into the code-knowledge graph (symbols, edges, docs). Use to populate Neo4j from the IDE.

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_ingest_repo
tools.description: Walk a local repository root and index all supported source files into the code-knowledge graph (Python/TS/JS/Go/Rust). Skips node_modules/.git/.venv/etc.

root_path.description: Absolute or expandable path to the repository root

include_extensions.description: Optional extension allow-list (e.g. [".py", ".ts"]); default = language matrix

exclude_dirs.description: Directory names to skip (default includes node_modules, .git, .venv, …)

tools.name: agentcore_code_graph_language_profile
tools.description: Return polyglot language/profile stats for symbols currently in the project graph.

tools.name: agentcore_create_task
tools.description: Create a durable Task record for follow-up engineering work.

tools.name: agentcore_write
tools.description: Write durable AgentCore records from Cursor: memory notes, tasks, activity, or decisions for the scoped project.

body.description: Full text body (memory) or decision statement

tools.name: agentcore_docs_drift_check
tools.description: Request a documentation drift check for changed symbols (docs-sync capability).

tools.name: agentcore_docs_write
tools.description: Documentation workflow from Cursor: validate frontmatter, index a doc note, or create a review draft for a symbol via docs-sync.

mode.description: validate=check frontmatter only; note/index=index a document; draft=create documentation draft for a symbol

symbol.description: Symbol path for draft/note linking (e.g. auth.hash_password)

file_path.description: Source file path for the symbol

path.description: Logical docs path for note/index (e.g. docs/modules/auth.md)

frontmatter.description: Optional full frontmatter object (validate/index). When set, overrides generated fields.

tools.name: agentcore_docs_status
tools.description: Return documentation coverage and missing-doc gaps for the scoped project.

tools.name: agentcore_guidance_resolve
tools.description: Resolve Agent Workspace Guidance for this project: AGENTS entry, always-on rules, and skill catalog. Prefer calling before substantive coding. Seeds MCP-first guidance when empty.

task_summary.description: Optional task summary for applicability scoring

include_skill_bodies.description: If true, include skill bodies in the catalog (prefer get_skill instead)

tools.name: agentcore_guidance_list_skills
tools.description: List AgentCore skill catalog descriptors without always-on rule bodies.

tools.name: agentcore_guidance_get_skill
tools.description: Fetch one Agent Workspace Guidance skill body by skill_id or name.

bundle_id.description: Optional correlation to a prior guidance resolve
